/bin/zsh -lc "git log --oneline --all -- sympy/polys/densetools.py | head -30
git log -S'dmp_clear_denoms' --oneline --all -- sympy/polys/densetools.py | head -30
git status --short
./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Poly, symbols, EX, S
from sympy.polys.densetools import dup_clear_denoms, dmp_clear_denoms
x=symbols('x')
# Try compact coefficient that is not recognized 0 until denom multiplication
for e in [(x/x)-1, 1/x-1/x, (x-x)/x]:
    c=EX(e)
    print(repr(e), repr(c), bool(c), c.denom())
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Poly, symbols
from sympy.polys.domains import EX
from sympy.polys.polyclasses import DMP
x=symbols('x')
z=Poly(0,x,domain=EX)
print(z.rep)
print(z.rep == DMP([], EX))
print(z.is_zero)
print(z.terms_gcd())
print(z.primitive())
PY"
